# HELP sglang:token_usage Token slots in use.
# TYPE sglang:token_usage gauge
sglang:token_usage 0.61
sglang:num_running_reqs 9
sglang:num_queue_reqs 2
sglang:num_preemptions_total 0
sglang:kv_transfer_sent_bytes_total{connector="mooncake"} 1048576
sglang:kv_transfer_recv_bytes_total{connector="mooncake"} 2097152
sglang:kv_transfer_errors_total{connector="mooncake"} 0
sglang:hicache_l1_hit_count_total 900
sglang:hicache_l2_hit_count_total 120
sglang:hicache_l3_hit_count_total 30
sglang:hicache_lookup_count_total 1100
sglang:hicache_l2_bytes 4294967296
sglang:hicache_l3_bytes 8589934592
sglang:time_to_first_token_seconds_sum 1.2
sglang:time_to_first_token_seconds_count 20
sglang:time_per_output_token_seconds_sum 0.6
sglang:time_per_output_token_seconds_count 80
